title: Polycell Fine Surface Polyfilla 400g Tube
availability_text: This item cannot be dispatched to your selected delivery location. Please choose a different delivery location.
description: The Polycell Fine Surface Filler from Polycell.Polycell Fine Surface Polyfilla is an easy way to fill fine cracks of up to 2mm. It produces a professional, glass smooth surface, and is ideal for minor blemishes and wood grain. The Polyfilla is quick drying, and touch dry in 30-60 minutes (depending on conditions). Once dry, it can be painted over to produce a flawless finish.Suitable for indoor use on wood and plaster.
